recommendations.title: Explain overdraft protection options
recommendations.rationale: Customer incurred a recent overdraft fee; walk through the overdraft protection options and how to avoid future fees.
required_disclosures: Fees vary by account type; see the current fee schedule.

recommendations.title: Warm referral to a licensed mortgage specialist
recommendations.rationale: Customer is shopping for a mortgage; introduce a warm referral to a licensed mortgage specialist who can assess eligibility.
recommendations.eligibility_basis: does not already hold mortgage; signal mortgage_shopping
required_disclosures: A referral is not a credit decision or an offer of credit.

recommendations.title: Share current relationship savings rate
recommendations.rationale: Savings balance is growing; share the current published relationship savings rate the customer is eligible for.
required_disclosures: Rates are variable and subject to change; see current rate sheet.

recommendations.title: Offer to enable paperless statements
recommendations.rationale: Explain how to enable paperless statements and set balance alerts in digital banking.
required_disclosures: Paperless enrollment can be changed at any time in settings.

specialist_referrals.reason: referral to a licensed specialist; NBA refers, it does not decide
investment advice is a licensed decision excluded from NBA

required: Servicing supervisor or QA reviewer before external delivery
Licensed specialist sign-off before any referral is acted on

standing_note: Draft recommendations only. No action here is a binding credit, claims, or investment decision; nothing has been delivered to the customer or written to any system of record. A human agent must review each recommendation, record the required approvals, and read the applicable disclosures before acting.
